caption: The video shows a close-up view of a vehicle's digital instrument cluster. A tachometer is visible on the left, featuring a red gauge with white numbers marking RPM intervals from 3 to 6, with smaller labels such as "3500," "4500," and "5500" and the text "RPM x1000" at the bottom. To the right of the gauge, a digital display shows the word "BRAKE" next to a red brake warning icon. Below this, instructional text reads, "Press Brake and Push Button to Start," followed by an odometer reading of "20434 mi." Across the sequence of frames, the scene remains static with no changes in the text, numerical values, or the position of the gauge needle. There are no people or other objects visible in the shots.
